home.sessionAnalysisDescription: Detailed analysis for the selected session — race, qualifying, practice and more

analysis.pageDescription: Lap times, pit strategy, and tyre degradation
analysis.selectSessionHint: Pick the year, GP and session from the selector
analysis.selectDriverHint: Pick drivers from the filter to compare
analysis.sectorPerformanceDescription: Sector-by-sector comparison on each driver's personal best lap (or the selected lap)
analysis.trackMapDescription: Plays each driver's fastest lap from the same start time so the racing-line differences are visible

trackMap.selectAtLeastOneDriver: Select at least one driver from the filter
trackMap.noLapData: No lap data found for the selected drivers.
trackMap.diagnosticsNoLapsHint: (Lap data may not have loaded for this session yet — try reloading in a moment.)

errors.rateLimit: Rate limit reached. Please wait a moment.
errors.fastf1Timeout: Request timed out (FastF1 is processing data)
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please reload the page.

disclaimer.title: ⚠️ Data Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: This telemetry data is fetched via the OpenF1 and FastF1 APIs and is an approximation. It may differ from official F1 telemetry, and may contain gaps or noise. Use it as a reference for race analysis only.
